UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents an authenticated business location or user managing the app. This entity links all operational data to a specific local instance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity (Firebase UID).

email.description: The email address associated with this user profile.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents an item available for sale in the Point of Sale (POS) system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

price.description: The selling price of the product.

Topping.title: Topping
Topping.description: Represents an additional item that can be added to a product.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Topping entity.

price.description: The additional price for the topping.

StockItem.title: StockItem
StockItem.description: Represents an inventory item or raw ingredient used in the business operations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StockItem entity.

name.description: The name of the stock item (e.g., 'TOMATE', 'PAN').

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the stock item (e.g., 'KG', 'UNID', 'LITRO').

stock.description: The current quantity of the item in stock.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer order placed through the POS system, to be prepared by the kitchen.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

clientName.description: The name of the customer for this order.

items.description: A list of products included in this order with their quantities and prices at the time of sale.

callerNumber.description: A random number assigned to the order for display in the kitchen monitor.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order was created.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Records individual financial movements (income or expense) within a specific shift or day.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Transaction entity.

concept.description: A description of the transaction (e.g., 'VENTA: JUAN PEREZ', 'COMPRA PAN').

amount.description: The monetary value of the transaction.

type.description: Indicates if the transaction is an 'ingreso' (income) or 'egreso' (expense).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the transaction occurred.

Closure.title: Closure
Closure.description: Represents a summary of financial activity for a closed shift or business day.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Closure entity.

date.description: The date and time when the shift or business day was officially closed.

cashAmount.description: The total amount of cash handled (income minus expenses) during the closed period.

transferAmount.description: The total amount of funds processed via electronic transfer during the closed period.

totalAmount.description: The grand total of all financial movements (cash + transfer) for the closed period.

transactionCount.description: The total number of individual transactions included in this closure summary.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}.description: Stores the profile data for an authenticated business location/user. This document's ID corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID. It serves as the root for all other user-specific data.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/produc.description: Contains product listings for a specific business location. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/toppin.description: Contains toppings for a specific business location. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/stockI.description: Manages inventory items and raw ingredients for a specific business location. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/orders.description: Stores customer orders placed at a specific business location. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/transa.description: Records individual financial movements (income/expense) for a specific business location. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/closur.description: Contains summary reports of financial activity for closed shifts or business days at a specific location. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.
